About Me

The person behind the pixels

It started during my school days. Whenever I had free time, I was editing photos, creating posters, or experimenting with Photoshop—not because I had to, but because I genuinely enjoyed making things look better.

Back then, I didn't know what UI/UX was. I just knew I loved creating. That curiosity slowly grew into an interest in digital products and eventually led me to discover UI/UX design—a field where creativity meets problem-solving.

Today, I can't use an app without noticing the experience. I naturally pay attention to layouts, interactions, and the tiny details that shape how people feel. I'm always asking myself, "How could this be simpler? Clearer? Better?"

Now, with nearly 2 years of professional experience, I design websites and digital products that balance user needs with business goals—while continuously learning, exploring, and refining my craft.

A journey of 2 years

May 2024 – Present

UI/UX Designer

Revv Growth

  • Started as a UI/UX Design Intern and progressed to Junior UI/UX Designer.
  • Designed 15+ website pages, landing pages, and blog experiences for B2B SaaS products.
  • Collaborated with developers, content teams, and stakeholders to create intuitive user experiences.
  • Improved usability, content hierarchy, and visual consistency across digital products.
  • Created wireframes, high-fidelity UI, prototypes, and design systems.
